/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -Werror "CMakeFiles/c10k-chat-server.dir/src/main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/c10k-chat-server.dir/src/epoll_manager.c.o" "CMakeFiles/c10k-chat-server.dir/src/connection_handler.c.o" "CMakeFiles/c10k-chat-server.dir/src/thread_pool.c.o" "CMakeFiles/c10k-chat-server.dir/src/task_queue.c.o" "CMakeFiles/c10k-chat-server.dir/src/message_router.c.o" "CMakeFiles/c10k-chat-server.dir/src/history_manager.c.o" "CMakeFiles/c10k-chat-server.dir/src/auth_manager.c.o" "CMakeFiles/c10k-chat-server.dir/src/signal_handler.c.o" "CMakeFiles/c10k-chat-server.dir/src/websocket_handler.c.o" "CMakeFiles/c10k-chat-server.dir/src/logger.c.o" -o c10k-chat-server  -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
